ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "pctChg" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "isST" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the stock is in Special Treatment (ST) status */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock (e.g., active, suspended, delisted) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* The highest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "last_dividend" REAL /* Last dividend paid */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient, indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for contact */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "data_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the data range accessed */,
  "data_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the data range accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance officer who performed the check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the compliance check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the compliance check (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "check_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the compliance check */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the check was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
